title: EXIM Bank Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 06 Manager and Deputy Manager Posts
description: Export-Import Bank of India (EXIM Bank) has declared the official notification for 2026. Allotted 06 Vacancies for Manager and Deputy Manager Jobs. Those candidates who have completed their Any Degree, Diploma, PGDM can use this opportunity and apply for the EXIM Bank Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online before the last ...
